description: Style NoteThe perfect blend of beauty and style, this silver colour necklace from pitaraa adds a touch of glamour to your wardrobe. Pair it with any outfit for a chic and bold look.Product DetailsSilver colour one strand necklace that has a fish scale design on one half of the necklace and a single bead design on the other half with a lobster claspMaterial and CareWhite metalPolish with soft cloth to maintain shine and keep away dust and dirtSizeLength of the necklace: 24 cm
